checkoutFooter.secureCheckout: Secure Checkout. All transactions are encrypted.

modals.errorContent: Something went wrong,Please try again later.

checkoutAddress.title: Where should we send your order?

errorPrompt.title: Oops!
errorPrompt.content: There is something wrong. Please check and try again.

shippingPreference.title: How would you like your items to be shipped?
shippingPreference.description: Some items have different availability dates. Ship them as they're ready or wait and combine for a single shipment.

asap.title: Ship items as soon as they're ready

together.title: Ship everything together
together.description: (Wait for all items in single shipment)

assemblyPreference.title: Do you want your items assembled?
assemblyPreference.description: We provide free assembly for items that require it, except for Accessories. Select "No" to receive unassembled items at your doorstep.

shipment.title: SHIPMENT {shipmentIndex}
shipment.subjectToAvailability: Subject to availability of delivery slots. Add-on charges apply for peak hour delivery slots on Saturday. Extra fees charged separately upon confirmation of delivery slot.

disposalService.title: Add Disposal Service
disposalService.description: Based on your delivery order, you can add {capabilityDescription}.

notes.title: *Note: Disposal service applies only to like-for-like items in the same product category (e.g. Disposal of your old sofa during the delivery of your new sofa). Please ensure that each item to be disposed:
conditions: Can be dismantled with ease and fit in the lift
Must be free from terminates, bed bugs or other living organisms
notes.explanation: Castlery reserves the right to reject any unfit disposal item upon checking during collection and shall refund full sum of disposal fee within 14 business days.
notes.help: If you are unsure of the type of disposal service you need to purchase beforehand, please contact our customer hotline at 3138 1999.

carryUpService.title: Add carry-up service
carryUpService.description: Carry Upstairs Service is mandatory for delivery to any location above ground floor without direct lift access.

notes.title: *Note: This service is limited to a maximum of 3 storeys / flights of stairs and the weight per item must not exceed 80kg each.
conditions: Carry Upstairs Service includes carrying furniture up any flight of stairs within apartments or landed property.
Carry Upstairs Service is required only for furniture items and does not need to be added on for accessory items.

standardService.name: Standard
supported: Delivered to your building lobby or first dry-area of your house.
Delivered via courier with signature required.
unsupported: No unpacking, assembly or rubbish removal.

roomOfChoiceService.name: Room of Choice
supported: Delivered to your room of choice, including up to two flights of stairs.
Delivered via courier with signature required.
unsupported: No unpacking, assembly or rubbish removal.

whiteGloveService.name: White Glove
supported: Delivered to your room of choice, including up to two flights of stairs.
Delivered via courier with signature required.
Unpacking, assembly and rubbish removal. (excl. existing furniture)

deliveryRequests.title: Do you have any other delivery requests?
notes: Product package(s) might not fit into some lifts. Please compare package dimensions with your lift size before purchasing.
Please note that delivery times are estimates and subject to change based on the availability of delivery slots.

orderExpired.title: Order expired
orderExpired.description: Oops, your order has expired. You can continue shopping or re-add items to your cart from the Order History page.

orderCanceled.title: Order Canceled
orderCanceled.descriptionPrefix: Oops, your order was cancelled during the payment process. Please

errors.providerNotSelected: Payment method provider is not selected
errors.orderDataMissing: Order information is incomplete, please try again
errors.paymentValidationFailed: Payment method validation failed, please check your details
errors.orderConditionCheckFailed: Please review and accept the order conditions before proceeding
errors.processPaymentFailed: Failed to process payment, please try again
errors.stripeHandlerNotInitialized: Payment form is not ready, please refresh and try again
errors.createOrderFailed: Failed to create order, please try again
errors.orderAlreadyPaid: This order has already been paid. Please view your order details or contact support if you need assistance.
errors.stripeInitializedFailed: Payment service is not ready, please refresh and try again
errors.elementsInitializedFailed: Payment form is not ready, please refresh and try again
errors.clientSecretNotProvided: Payment session is not ready, please try again
errors.paymentElementSubmitFailed: Failed to submit payment details, please try again
errors.paymentConfirmFailed: Payment confirmation failed, please try again

rules.title: Pay Over Time
rules.description: Rates are between 10–30% APR. A down payment may be required.

rules.title: Flexible Monthly Payment
rules.description: Get a real-time decision with just 5 pieces of info.

rules.title: See if you are eligible
rules.description: Checking your eligibility won't affect your credit.

afterPayPayment.description: Click on the ‘Place your order’ button and you will be redirected to Afterpay to process your order.

zipPayPayment.ruleMoreThanThreshold: {amount} weekly for 12 months, $9.95 monthly fees apply
zipPayPayment.description: Click on the 'Place your order' button and you will be redirected to Zip to process your order.

paypalPayment.description: Click on PayPal button below to place your order.

grabPayPayment.description: Clicking 'Place Your Order' button below will take you to GrabPay payment page.

termsAndConditions.title: Terms & Conditions
termsAndConditions.description: By clicking the Place Your Order button, I accept Castlery's <1>refund</1> and <2>delivery</2> policy. Your order is on hold until payment is completed. You won't be able to make changes, but you can restart the checkout process if needed.
termsAndConditions.dialogMessage: Please accept <1>refund</1> and <2>delivery</2> policy before placing the order.

pendingPaymentError.title: Oops, your payment may still be processing
pendingPaymentError.description: Please check order details for the latest order status.
